textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
textByHash.36c6b7f96fcdac5451aab58295f541ff0647bc6f: But I loscht my bottle. Scho I now ffind scholiss in the bottle.
textByHash.5b5680d48a80e3168a1121d57c94be303709b203: Aaa shomefing ter go wiv my beer. Thish dwarf beerz quite shtrong you know...
textByHash.7960a3643da49a85a87654d96296b681a62445af: Here you go, have a dashing pilot's scarf.
textByHash.8bbee7d17b695dbfbcb2fb3b4123a37001e22757: I yousht to be a tesht pilot yoo know. I reeel hero.
textByHash.b4352906569836025467d2753a7221896c89bba5: I have some spare goggles, you might as well have them.
textByHash.be194b10dcd969e480a3077d8e6cb3a14d5cd7f7: I'm enjoyn' the local hoschpitalieee. hee hee.
textByHash.c5e03d5d51d015f96070381417b84e129f4c1e82: tee hee, I probblie schoodn' 'av anuva drinkie right now. But dis dwarven beer ish kind of moreish after the fiff pint.
textByHash.d4d9d63f0d3d49528f341b2d962180bbda4a19ad: Naaah, I realished I woz scared ov heightsh.
